title: Support for `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/containers/auth.json` undocumented in man pages
body:
The various manual pages of skopeo that talk about the auth file only mention `$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/containers/auth.json` and `$HOME/.docker/config.json`, which is far incomplete. The actual behaviour is much more complicated and also seems to be platform-dependent.

I think it's probably best to just reference [containers-auth.json(5)](https://manned.org/man/containers-auth.json) and let it explain the various locations in detail.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Thanks for the report! #2614 should help.
